channel.title: Money Management on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Money Management on MinWeb

item.title: Stop Overspending: The "Noticeability Rule" for Purchases
item.description:
Have you ever stood in a store, holding a $200 shirt or a designer accessory, wondering if it was actually worth the price tag? You probably told yourself it was “an investment” or that it signaled something about your taste. But be honest: how much of that purchase was for your own comfort, and how much of it was just to ensure someone else noticed the logo?

Here is a liberating truth that will save you thousands of dollars a year: If it’s something you wouldn’t notice on other people, it’s not worth the premium price.

item.title: How to Manage a Massive Salary Jump Without Losing Wealth
item.description:
You finally landed that massive promotion or the high-paying job you’ve been chasing for years. You log into your banking app, see that direct deposit, and feel a surge of pure adrenaline. You’ve “made it.”

Then, the realization hits. Within a few months, that extra cash vanishes into thin air. You aren’t building wealth; you’re just buying better coffee, a nicer car, and yet another subscription you’ll use once. (Seriously, who actually tracks their unused apps?)
